action.message:
New session started in the use_cases workspace. Quick orientation:

## Architecture
- Two layers: use_cases/common/ (shared engine) + use_cases/{name}.py (per-robot tools)
- USE_CASE env var selects which tool file to load (default: deepracer)
- common/base_tools.py defines the interface: 9 functions + 4 physics constants
- load_tools() + validate_tools() are the entry points — never import use case files directly

## Running
- USE_CASE=drone python common/main.py --vision
- USE_CASE=roomba python common/app_ui.py
- USE_CASE=boat python common/main.py --mock

## Safety Rules (non-negotiable)
- All tool functions must catch exceptions and return error strings — never raise
- stop() must be callable at any time, even before connect()
- Credentials must never appear in return strings or logs
- Physics constants must reflect actual hardware — do not change without re-measuring

## Before editing any use case file
- Check validate_tools() passes after your changes
- Confirm stop() still works without a prior connect()
- Confirm error strings start with 'Error' (capital E)

What would you like to work on?
